# Pull Request Template

## 1. Summary
*Briefly describe the purpose of this PR, what issue it resolves, and the technical approach taken.*

---

## 2. Changes Introduced
- **Backend changes**: *Summary of modified files/routers*
- **Frontend changes**: *Summary of React elements/stores*
- **Infrastructure**: *Migrations, Docker file changes, or package updates*

---

## 3. Testing Performed
- **Automated Tests**: *List test suites run and coverage results (e.g. backend coverage 90%).*
- **Manual Verification**: *Steps taken to test this branch manually (e.g. testing inputs validation on web forms).*

---

## 4. UI / Visual Changes (If Applicable)
*Embed screenshots or screen recordings showing visual changes across desktop/mobile views.*

---

## 5. Checklist
- [ ] Code follows [Coding Standards](file:///c:/Users/DELL/omnivote/docs/handbook/coding-standards.md)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or passwords committed
- [ ] API routes are documented using OpenAPI schema annotations
- [ ] Local tests and quality gates pass successfully
- [ ] Linked related issue or sprint ticket
